name: Dijon Mustard Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Red wine vinegar or white wine vinegar
Parsley sprigs and red/green bell pepper slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add potatoes and cook, with lid slightly open, until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain well and let cool.
2. In a bowl, whisk together garlic, crushed red pepper flakes, mustard, mayonnaise, vinegar, and olive oil. Cut cooled potatoes into small pieces and add to the bowl. Stir in all remaining ingredients except garnishes. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight before serving. If the mixture is too thick, add up to 2 tablespoons of water. Serve garnished with parsley and pepper slices.
